# The Sonic Roast

> Coffee podcast site focused on episodes, archive browsing, and show notes.

## Site
- Name: The Sonic Roast
- Type: Podcast website
- Primary language: English
- Main framework: React + Vite

## Canonical URLs
- / 
- /archive
- /about
- /episode/1

## LLM Access Notes
- All public pages are intended for indexing and summarization.
- No authentication is required for route access.
- Route content is client-rendered by React.

## Suggested Sources For Retrieval
- /archive
- /episode/1
- /about
- /sitemap.xml
- /llms-full.txt
